name: Githriian
bio:
Physical Appearance: Bosmer (Wood Elf) female wearing a mage's robe. Armed with a bow and arrows as well as another melee weapon. Uses mage spells in combat.
Race: Bosmer
Personality Keywords: mage, thief, hostile, criminal, aggressive, cave dweller
Role: Githriian is a mage hiding out with her fellow thieves in Hrota Cave, located just north of Anvil. She combines magical abilities with physical combat skills, wielding both a bow and a melee weapon alongside her spellcasting.
Home Location Information: Hrota Cave, north of Anvil. She remains near the entrance of the cave.
Daily Routine: Githriian stays near the entrance of Hrota Cave at all times, never sleeping or eating despite having resources available for both. She remains alert and ready for combat.
Personality - The Hostile Mage: Githriian is aggressive and attacks intruders on sight without warning or explanation. She will not accept any attempt at surrender or negotiation, fighting to the end.
author: Bethesda
